creator: twp@unchi.org
text:
This is a diff for the GNU Common Lisp port, bringing it up to GCL 2.4.0.

The GCL 2.3 port includes the comment "GCL is not compatible with the
new signals," but it's not clear to me what this means.  The
signal-handling code in GCL 2.4.0 builds on FreeBSD without changes.
I have not tested it; however, one stage of the GCL build process is
to bootstrap a Lisp compiler, so a significant portion of the GCL
environment appears to work.

If the GCL port is still without a maintainer, then I will volunteer.
